architectureNote: objects is a stateless MinIO proxy domain with no local persistence (model.go:8-9); GORM/DDD-specific checks (Make/ToEntity/provider/administrator/api2go Transform/RegisterInputHandler) are N/A by design, consistent with buckets/audit packages. Bulk-delete folds into the existing Processor as a method per anti-patterns.md:156.

checks.name: builder.go / validated construction
checks.evidence: no domain model; builder.go:15 ValidateObjectKey is the edge validator used at processor.go:805

checks.name: Processor accepts FieldLogger
checks.evidence: zerolog variant; Processor.Logger zerolog.Nop default processor.go:159,168

checks.name: POST typed input handler
checks.evidence: chi handler + flat BulkDeleteRequest rest.go:110-114, resource.go:433-438

checks.name: No os.Getenv in handlers
checks.evidence: zero matches; config via Processor.Config resource.go:144,254

checks.name: No cross-domain logic in handlers
checks.evidence: bulkDelete handler calls only h.p.BulkDelete resource.go:431-463

checks.name: No direct entity creation in handlers
administrator.go for writes
checks.evidence: no DB; MinIO writes in processor + bulkdelete.go helpers

checks.name: Domain error to HTTP status mapping
JSON:API interface on REST models
checks.evidence: hand-rolled ResourceType/ResourceID/MarshalJSON rest.go:17-21; action-shape plain JSON by design

checks.name: No manual JSON:API envelope parsing
checks.evidence: json.NewDecoder.Decode flat body resource.go:434 — package-wide action convention, no envelope hand-rolling (I3)

security.name: Inherits session auth
security.evidence: objects.Routes mounted in RequireSession+RequireCSRF group serve.go:219-231; route resource.go:76

security.name: Whole-bucket-wipe guard
security.evidence: empty/'/' prefix and empty request -> 400 before MinIO call processor.go:800-813; tests bulkdelete_test.go:110-126

security.name: Object-key validation
security.evidence: ValidateObjectKey per key processor.go:804-808; builder.go:15-29; test bulkdelete_test.go:122-126

security.name: No version ID on delete (delete-marker parity)
security.evidence: miniogo.ObjectInfo{Key} + RemoveObjectsOptions{} bulkdelete.go:91,80; mirrors single Delete processor.go:304

security.name: One audit per delete, correct target-id, none on dry-run/reject
security.evidence: single recordAudit processor.go:844-857; dry-run/rejects return earlier processor.go:800-826; target-id rule processor.go:836-839; outcome flip processor.go:840-843

security.name: Audit payload cannot leak secrets/URLs
security.evidence: Record calls Sanitize unconditionally processor.go:30,38; regex sanitize.go:8; payload only counts/prefixes processor.go:851-856; no_secrets_test covers object.bulk_delete model.go:46

goroutineReview.evidence: defer cancel bulkdelete.go:31-32; early-ceiling break bulkdelete.go:46; stub honours ctx.Done helpers_test.go:297-303
defer cancel bulkdelete.go:64-65; listing-error return bulkdelete.go:104; worker honours ctx.Done helpers_test.go:320-322

nonBlocking: I5: stale `var _ = errFailing` keep-alive + misleading comment now dead since three tests use errFailing (helpers_test.go:279-281; bulkdelete_test.go:52,97,162)
infoFindings: I1: BulkDeleteResult overloads dry-run vs delete fields in one struct; documented (model.go:76-84)
I2: count over-reports on overlapping prefixes; intentional best-effort per PRD (bulkdelete.go:23-25)
I3: json.NewDecoder.Decode for flat action body — package convention, not JSON:API envelope hand-rolling (resource.go:434)
I4: deleteExpansion discards partial count on listing error but processor returns empty result + 502, so no misleading count surfaces (bulkdelete.go:104, processor.go:829)
